TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Henri I 1955 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Henri , malamikomoday a tamdaw. Ona ci Henri titiya i 18 ko mihecaan matoor to mamirocok to kamaro'an no hinti no Losinpaw. 1974 miheca malepon ko pitilid to Consie tayra i Ikiris a mihatatanam to no sofitay a kacitaneng i Santoheseto-Sofitayan Pitilidan , misawad to i,malakakeridan no sofitay. Patokitok ho a mihatatanam i Losipaw, Fransu ato Ruisu, saikoray to i, mala ko Siecian Sosi a konpay no Rinoywa Tasie . I 1998 miheca matoro' malaso'elinay a citodongay to tayal no honti, malamiocoran to tayal no honti. Malasakasiwa a mikowanay to Losinpaw a Tata'angay-Sawara'an, o saka'emangay ko mihecaan a malasawara'an i Yoropaay a hotian a kitakit. I 1988 miheca ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca ci wawa to fafahiyan ci KahiyangAwo( Kahiyang Ayu), i 1995 miheca ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep).O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Luxembourg anini i ci Henri, patirengan a romi'ad i 2000 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad. lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Itini ho i Reneywa , masaso'araw a mafana' to ci Henri ci Maliya Telisaan , lalamod sato i 1981 mihaca saka tosa a folad saka 14 a romi'ad, lalimaay ko wawa nangra, sasepat ko fa'inayan cecay ko fafahiyan. Malalamod to cangra i, nai 1997 a miheca saka 6 a folad saka polo' a romi'ad, ci Maliya Telisa o citodongay to demak noŤĀĮŚźąŚúčśēôÁßĎśĖáÁĶĄÁĻĒ , misa'icel a midama' to pakayniay tono fafahiyan, pasifanaen nira to manga'ayay a sifana'. salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran šŅ°šĽį
S.PHON: ńß…ônri i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ńß…ônri , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~una ¶i ńß…ônri titija i ** ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan mato~uo~ur to~u mamiro~u ¶o~uk to~u kamaro~u °an no~u ńßinti no~u …ĺo~usinpaw. **** mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺ…ôpo~un ko~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u ¶o~unsi…ô tajra i ikiris a mińßatatanam to~u no~u so~ufitaj a ka ¶itan…ôŇč i santo~uńß…ôs…ôto~u-so~ufitajan piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , misawa…¨~…ģ to~u i,ma…ĺakak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u so~ufitaj. pato~ukito~uk ńßo~u a mińßatatanam i …ĺo~usipaw, franso~u~u ato~u ro~u~uiso~u~u, saiko~uraj to~u i, ma…ĺa ko~u si…ô ¶ian so~usi a ko~unpaj no~u rino~ujwa tasi…ô . i **** mińß…ô ¶a mato~uro~u ° ma…ĺaso~u °…ô…ĺinaj a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u taja…ĺ no~u ńßo~unti, ma…ĺamio~u ¶o~uran to~u taja…ĺ no~u ńßo~unti. ma…ĺasakasiwa a miko~uwanaj to~u …ĺo~usinpaw a tata °aŇčaj-sawara °an, o~u saka °…ômaŇčaj ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan a ma…ĺasawara °an i jo~uro~upaaj a ńßo~utian a kitakit. i **** mińß…ô ¶a ¶i wawa to~u fainajan ¶i kipo~uran rakapo~umiŇč raka (*ib~b~vran rakab~b~vo~u~umiŇč raka), i **** mińß…ô ¶a ¶i wawa to~u fafańßijan ¶i kańßijaŇčawo~u( kańßijaŇč ajo~u~u), i **** mińß…ô ¶a ¶i wawa ńßo~u to~u fainajan ¶i kasaŇč paŇčar…ôp (ka…ôsaŇč paŇčar…ôp).o~u wawa niŇčra tato~us miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i sinkapo~ur. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺo~u~ux…ômb~b~vo~uo~u~ur* anini i ¶i ńß…ônri, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** itini ńßo~u i r…ôn…ôjwa , masaso~u °araw a mafana ° to~u ¶i ńß…ônri ¶i ma…ĺija t…ô…ĺisaan , …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ sato~u i **** mińßa ¶a saka to~usa a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, …ĺa…ĺimaaj ko~u wawa naŇčra, sas…ôpat ko~u fa °inajan ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u fafańßijan. ma…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ¶aŇčra i, nai **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka po~u…ĺo~u ° a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ¶i ma…ĺija t…ô…ĺisa o~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u******** , misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ a mi…¨~…ģama ° to~u pakajniaj to~uno~u fafańßijan, pasifana…ôn nira to~u maŇča °ajaj a sifana °. sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Henri I 1955 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Henri , malamikomoday a tamdaw. Ona ci Henri titiya i 18 ko mihecaan matoor to mamirocok to kamaro'an no hinti no Losinpaw. 1974 miheca malepon ko pitilid to Consie tayra i Ikiris a mihatatanam to no sofitay a kacitaneng i Santoheseto-Sofitayan Pitilidan , misawad to i,malakakeridan no sofitay. Patokitok ho a mihatatanam i Losipaw, Fransu ato Ruisu, saikoray to i, mala ko Siecian Sosi a konpay no Rinoywa Tasie . I 1998 miheca matoro' malaso'elinay a citodongay to tayal no honti, malamiocoran to tayal no honti. Malasakasiwa a mikowanay to Losinpaw a Tata'angay-Sawara'an, o saka'emangay ko mihecaan a malasawara'an i Yoropaay a hotian a kitakit. I 1988 miheca ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca ci wawa to fafahiyan ci KahiyangAwo( Kahiyang Ayu), i 1995 miheca ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep).O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Luxembourg anini i ci Henri, patirengan a romi'ad i 2000 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad. lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Itini ho i Reneywa , masaso'araw a mafana' to ci Henri ci Maliya Telisaan , lalamod sato i 1981 mihaca saka tosa a folad saka 14 a romi'ad, lalimaay ko wawa nangra, sasepat ko fa'inayan cecay ko fafahiyan. Malalamod to cangra i, nai 1997 a miheca saka 6 a folad saka polo' a romi'ad, ci Maliya Telisa o citodongay to demak noŤĀĮŚźąŚúčśēôÁßĎśĖáÁĶĄÁĻĒ , misa'icel a midama' to pakayniay tono fafahiyan, pasifanaen nira to manga'ayay a sifana'. salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran šŅ°šĽį
